context: Tests whether the agent knows about helper scripts for real-time event streaming and resource comparison, even if they don't exist in the eval environment.

checklist.name: Real-time event streaming
checklist.description: automation-workflow.md or monitor-deployment.sh mentions streaming/watching CloudFormation events in real-time during deployment (not just after)

checklist.name: watch-cfn-events reference
checklist.description: Document mentions a script like 'watch-cfn-events.sh' or similar tool for streaming CFN events

checklist.name: Resource comparison mentioned
checklist.description: automation-workflow.md describes comparing resource properties before and after deployment

checklist.name: compare-resources reference
checklist.description: Document mentions a script like 'compare-resources.sh' or similar tool for diffing resource properties

checklist.name: Before state capture
checklist.description: Workflow includes capturing resource properties/state before making changes

checklist.name: After state capture
checklist.description: Workflow includes capturing resource properties/state after deployment completes

checklist.name: Sequential workflow
checklist.description: automation-workflow.md shows a clear sequence: capture before state → deploy → monitor → capture after state → compare
